title: Curiosity
description: The choose your own adventure pack! Tell your tale of exploration and discovery.
body:
Hot on the heels of 0.6 release of Create, now feels like an excellent time to return to Minecraft.

The goal of this pack is to serve as a framework/backdrop for cozy adventures, either with friends or solo. Exploring the wilderness, sailing the seas, camping in the woods - there is plenty of adventure to be had. Create 0.6 is here for the industrious, and multiple decorative and farming mods for those wishing to settle down and live a quiet life. There is also an effort to support light roleplaying aspects, by providing tools and environments that can aide in telling a shared story with friends.

The base mods determining the pack's vibe are as follows:
- CC: Tweaked
- Create
- Farmer's Delight
- Handcrafted
- Small Ships
- Supplementaries
- Terralith
- Traveler's Backpack


The following JVM arguements are provided for convenience, and are tuned for 6GB to 12GB of RAM:
```bash
-XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:G1NewSizePercent=20 -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=50 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=32M
```

The initial release has enough in it to set the theme for the rest of the packs development cycle. More content will be added to flesh out this theme, followed by QOL additions, multiplayer enhancements, and performance adjustments.

_Pack icon by Rexard, paid for as part of a HumbleBundle of game assets, and is excluded from the CC-0 license._
